recommendations.title: Summer of Soul (...Or, When the Revolution Could Not Be Televised)
recommendations.overview: During the same summer as Woodstock, over 300,000 people attended the Harlem Cultural Festival, celebrating African American music and culture, and promoting Black pride and unity. The footage from the festival sat in a basement, unseen for over 50 y

recommendations.title: DeVour
recommendations.overview: Friends become increasingly addicted to a video game that has an evil agenda.

recommendations.title: Gyo: Tokyo Fish Attack
recommendations.overview: Kaori, Erika and Aki are celebrating their graduation when an infestation of walking fish forces them to re-evaluate their circumstances.

recommendations.title: The Meyerowitz Stories (New and Selected)
recommendations.overview: An estranged family gathers together in New York for an event celebrating the artistic work of their father.

recommendations.title: Popcorn
recommendations.overview: While holding a horror film festival, a group of film students find themselves stalked by a madman who may have a sinister connection to a cult leader.

recommendations.title: The Hills Run Red
recommendations.overview: A group of young horror fans go searching for a film that mysteriously vanished years ago but instead find that the demented killer from the movie is real, and he's thrilled to meet fans who will die gruesomely for his art.

recommendations.title: Rifkin’s Festival
recommendations.overview: The story of a married American couple who go to the San Sebastian Film Festival. They get caught up in the magic of the festival, the beauty and charm of Spain and the fantasy of movies. She has an affair with a brilliant French movie director, and

recommendations.title: The Birds
recommendations.overview: Thousands of birds flock into a seaside town and terrorize the residents in a series of deadly attacks.

recommendations.title: The Front Room
recommendations.overview: Everything goes to hell for newly-pregnant Belinda after her mother-in-law moves in. As the diabolical guest tries to get her claws on the child, Belinda must draw the line somewhere.

recommendations.title: Black Sheep
recommendations.overview: After a childhood prank by his brother Angus causes Henry to develop a phobia of sheep, he must step up to the onslaught of a genetically-mutated man-eating flock with the help of his friend and a young environmentalist.
